mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.username as username ,a.password as password ,a.xiaofeizhe_name as xiaofeizheName ,a.xiaofeizhe_phone as xiaofeizhePhone ,a.xiaofeizhe_id_number as xiaofeizheIdNumber ,a.xiaofeizhe_photo as xiaofeizhePhoto ,a.sex_types as sexTypes ,a.xiaofeizhe_email as xiaofeizheEmail ,a.create_time as createTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM xiaofeizhe a
and a.id in
#{item}
and a.id = #{params.id}
and a.username like CONCAT('%',#{params.username},'%')
and a.xiaofeizhe_name like CONCAT('%',#{params.xiaofeizheName},'%')
and a.xiaofeizhe_phone like CONCAT('%',#{params.xiaofeizhePhone},'%')
and a.xiaofeizhe_id_number like CONCAT('%',#{params.xiaofeizheIdNumber},'%')
and a.sex_types = #{params.sexTypes}
and a.xiaofeizhe_email like CONCAT('%',#{params.xiaofeizheEmail},'%')
order by a.${params.orderBy} desc
